[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11000000 2
1 10000000 1
2 00111110 5
3 01100011 4
4 01000011 3
5 00001100 2
6 10000011 3
7 11110010 5

01 10 01001111 5
12 21 10001111 5
23 32 01110001 4
34 43 00110100 3
45 54 00000101 2
56 65 11111101 7
67 76 01011101 5
70 07 00100000 1

02 20 11000000 2 match 0
13 31 11111110 7
24 42 01000101 3
35 53 00110001 3
46 64 11111000 5
57 75 10100000 2
60 06 01111101 6
71 17 01101111 6

14 41 11001010 4
25 52 01000000 1
36 63 11001100 4
47 74 10100101 4
50 05 10000000 1 match 1
61 16 00110010 3
72 27 11100000 3

15 51 11001111 6

37 73 10010001 3
